posts.text:
NEW VIDEO
On YouTube now. For free. No ads, no sponsorships, just pure uncut content.
Also wow this place is a shithole. A full feed of vagueposts, disinfo, and war propaganda interspersed with bizarre pornography and gambling ads. Sign me up.
Hello Nazis and pedos. I’m returning to this wonderful platform you have here because I have a new video to promote this weekend to the coveted Nazi/pedo demographics.
If you write poetry we disagree with, you will be shot in the face three times by federal agents and framed for murder by the President. Anyway, I’m a free speech absolutist, don’t tread on me.

pas les blue states SVP


Polling USA (@USA_Polling)

Fun fact, France is the only nuclear country with an official nuclear doctrine that allows them to launch a nuke as a -warning- shot



— https://nitter.net/USA_Polling/status/2009036830323208561#m
this armed and dangerous piglet is still at large

Lib-ishly: abolish ICE, unmask them all, and put them on trial for their crimes


evan loves worf (@esjesjesj)

They ended up murdering a woman




— https://nitter.net/esjesjesj/status/2008966664184877356#m

The Nobel Committee might need to step up here. Tease that you’re considering him for a Peace Prize—a bigger, beautifuler one than Obama got—but only if he doesn’t try to annex anything. Then just revoke it when he dies.

American civilians are soft babies who will lose the will to fight at the first sign of inconvenience, and the President is a senile idiot who can’t focus on anything for more than a week and is easily distracted by shiny objects. Do with that what you will.


The Spectator Index (@spectatorindex)

BREAKING: France is working with its allies on a plan 'should US move on Greenland', according to Reuters report.



— https://nitter.net/spectatorindex/status/2008851889056866449#m

Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

TAPPER: Can you rule out that the US is going to take Greenland by force?

STEPHEN MILLER: Greenland should be part of the US. By what right does Denmark assert control over Greenland? The US is the power of NATO. 

TAPPER: So you can't take military force off the table?

MILLER: Nobody is gonna fight the US militarily over the future of Greenland.

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2008318519142686860#m
well well well if it isn’t the Will to Power discharging its strength
it’s not even proper imperialism, it’s like a Viking LARP, monkey-brained Bronze Age piracy
The American Right is completely regressing to a pre-capitalist imperial fantasy of rape and pillage

Anyway while we’re here—and I realize truth is irrelevant, the people I’m arguing with are not capable of (much less interested in) actual thinking about psychology—but for my own amusement more than anything, let’s explore the link between transvestism and sexual homicide. Sooo fun. 

Transvestic fetishism doesn’t have a single psychological origin, it’s extremely diverse. For most men who erotically crossdress,
the appeal is masochistic (sissy hypno, feminization as degradation, etc). But ther

Replies pointing out that Buffalo Bill is canonically not trans are being met with incredulity because we’ve regressed to the point that Hannibal Lecter in The Silence of the Lambs (1991) is considered anachronistically woke
I don’t even need to quote tweet anything, you know what I’m talking about
I hate conspiratorial explanations but I feel like I have to wonder—is the online left truly, organically this stupid, or is it all some kind of Russian op?
Saw | ContraPoints
Conspiracy | ContraPoints
